PROJECTS
Resume Analyzer
•Built a full-stack resume analyzer using Next.js, Express.js, and MongoDB.
•Implemented drag-and-drop file upload and dashboard analytics.
•Improved parsing reliability by adding structured section detection and skill normalization.
